meta.notes: Phase 1 draft non-functional budgets for a science-fair demo app. | Phase 2: no numeric budget changes; confirmed app is judge-demo focused.

purpose: Set practical performance, reliability, and integrity budgets for a judge-facing demo app.

performance_budgets.notes: Targets are assumptions; confirm via OQ-010.

data_integrity_targets.pilot_csv_validation: Strict numeric validation with clear mapping for ambiguous columns.
data_integrity_targets.no_synthetic_pilot_data: Pilot charts must reflect loaded dataset only.

cost_budget.notes: For science fair demo, prefer free/low-cost hosting; cannot confirm budget.

privacy_security_posture.data_classification: De-identified teen data (still treat as sensitive).
privacy_security_posture.auth: kiosk by default; admin-only for ingestion if enabled (OQ-003).

observability.client_logging: Capture errors with a trace_id; show user-friendly errors.
observability.audit_trail: Store run_id/run_hash and export events for reproducibility.
